Healthy.remedy: Fasal bilkul theek hai! Niyamit dekhbhal jaari rakho.

Leaf Blight.remedy: Mancozeb 2g/liter paani mein milakar spray karein. Beemari ke patte hata dein.
Leaf Blight.prevention: Zyada paani dene se bachein. Crop rotation karein.

Powdery Mildew.remedy: Sulfur-based fungicide spray karein (Sulphex 3g/L). Subah spray best time hai.
Powdery Mildew.prevention: Plants ke beech space rakhein. Overwatering avoid karein.

Rust Disease.prevention: Resistant varieties use karein. Infected plants hata dein.

Leaf Spot.remedy: Copper Oxychloride 3g/liter spray karein. 2 hafte mein 2 baar.
Leaf Spot.prevention: Seedon ko overwater mat karein. Good drainage rakho.

Bacterial Wilt.remedy: Streptomycin antibiotic spray (100ppm). Infected plants turant nikalo.

Downy Mildew.prevention: Morning mein paani dein, raat ko nahi. Spacing badhao.

Anthracnose.remedy: Carbendazim 1g/liter spray karein. Infected fruits/leaves hatao.
Anthracnose.prevention: Healthy seeds use karein. Field saaf rakho.

Yellow Mosaic Virus.remedy: Koi direct ilaj nahi — infected plants hatao. Whitefly control karein (Imidacloprid spray).
Yellow Mosaic Virus.prevention: Virus-resistant varieties lagao. Whitefly se bachao.

Early Blight.remedy: Chlorothalonil 2g/liter spray karein. Weekly spraying karein.
Early Blight.prevention: Mulching karein. Infected patte hatate raho.

Late Blight.remedy: Cymoxanil + Mancozeb spray karein. Turant action zaruri hai!
Late Blight.prevention: Certified seeds use karein. Avoid overhead irrigation.

Nutrient Deficiency.remedy: Soil test karwao. NPK balanced fertilizer daalein. Micronutrient spray karein.
Nutrient Deficiency.prevention: Regular soil testing. Balanced fertilization plan banao.
